---- Minecraft Crash Report ----
// Everything's going wrong!

Time: 2024-04-15 08:30:00
Description: Mod create is a Forge mod and cannot be loaded on Fabric

java.lang.RuntimeException: Could not execute entrypoint stage 'main' due to missing required mods!
    at net.fabricmc.loader.impl.FabricLoaderImpl.load(FabricLoaderImpl.java:200)
    at net.fabricmc.loader.impl.FabricLoaderImpl.init(FabricLoaderImpl.java:150)
    Caused by: java.lang.ClassNotFoundException: net.minecraftforge.fml.common.Mod
    at java.base/jdk.internal.loader.BuiltinClassLoader.loadClass(BuiltinClassLoader.java:641)

Fabric mods: create 0.5.1f, fabric-api 0.92.0, fabric-loader 0.15.6

-- System Details --
Minecraft Version: 1.20.1
Fabric Loader: 0.15.6
Note: create is a Forge/NeoForge mod. Use the Fabric port instead.
